title: How a godly man handles the wait
caption:
The wait is not a gap. It's a building site.

Most men treat the season before marriage as something to survive — a holding pattern between the real chapters. But what's actually happening in it is formation. The habits, the sin you kill, the brotherhood you build, the prayer life you develop — all of that is the man who will walk in.

The guy who's been performing for a future wife has the whole thing backwards. She can smell the desperation, the performance, the restlessness of a man trying to manufacture something God hasn't handed him yet. The man walking with God doesn't have that energy. He has something else.

He makes everything beautiful in its time. — Ecclesiastes 3:11

Stop auditioning. Start forming. The right thing happens to the man who's too busy becoming to go hunting.

—

Comment "wait" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #scripture #dating #thevision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
